questions.question: In Pinia's setup syntax, what do ref, computed, and plain functions map to respectively?
Why must you use storeToRefs when destructuring a Pinia store?
options: Direct destructuring calls the store factory again and creates a new instance
Direct destructuring breaks reactivity since properties are extracted as plain values
storeToRefs adds TypeScript type safety that plain destructuring lacks
Vue's Proxy cannot track destructured store properties without storeToRefs

questions.question: Which Pinia method allows you to update multiple state properties atomically in one call?
